Columns.Name: /* VIEW */
Columns.Type: CREATE VIEW active_users AS SELECT id, name, email, role, created_at FROM users WHERE isadmin = FALSE

Columns.Name: /* MATERIALIZED VIEW */
Columns.Type: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW post_stats AS SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.title, COUNT(c.id) AS comment_count, COUNT(DISTINCT c.user_id) AS unique_commenters, MAX(c.created_at) AS last_comment_at FROM posts p LEFT JOIN comments c ON c.post_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.title

Columns.Name: /* VIEW */
Columns.Type: CREATE VIEW user_activity_summary AS SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p WHERE p.user_id = u.id) AS post_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.user_id = u.id) AS comment_count, (SELECT MAX(p.created_at) FROM posts p WHERE p.user_id = u.id) AS last_post_at, CASE WHEN u.isadmin THEN 'admin' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p WHERE p.user_id = u.id) > 10 THEN 'power_user' ELSE 'regular' END AS user_type FROM users u

Columns.Name: age_range
Columns.Generated: CASE WHEN age IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN age < 18 THEN '[0,18)'::int4range WHEN age < 35 THEN '[18,35)'::int4range WHEN age < 55 THEN '[35,55)'::int4range ELSE '[55,)'::int4range END

raw_statements: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;

CREATE DOMAIN percentage AS NUMERIC(5,2)
    CHECK (VALUE >= 0 AND VALUE <= 100);

CREATE DOMAIN hex_color AS TEXT
    CHECK (VALUE ~ '^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$');

CREATE TYPE address_type AS (
    street  TEXT,
    city    TEXT,
    state   TEXT,
    zip     VARCHAR(10),
    country TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE audit_log_2024 PARTITION OF audit_log
    FOR VALUES FROM ('2024-01-01') TO ('2025-01-01');

CREATE TABLE audit_log_2025 PARTITION OF audit_log
    FOR VALUES FROM ('2025-01-01') TO ('2026-01-01');

CREATE TABLE audit_log_2026 PARTITION OF audit_log
    FOR VALUES FROM ('2026-01-01') TO ('2027-01-01');
